'''Viper Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] consisting of [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]].

The squadron was part of a failed attempt to [[Attack on the Compellor|destroy]] the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Compellor]]''. Its mission was to wipe out the cruiser's [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starfighter defense while providing cover for [[Phoenix Squadron/Legends|Phoenix Squadron]] as it launched an assault on ''Compellor'' itself. However, all of the Viper Squadron A-wings were destroyed along with the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] of Phoenix Squadron.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
